component.name: Halo AI Core
component.summary: Bare-metal AI stack installer for AMD Strix Halo

description.p: Halo AI Core installs and configures a complete local AI stack on AMD Strix Halo hardware. Components include ROCm, Caddy reverse proxy, llama.cpp with Vulkan/ROCm, AMD Lemonade SDK, and Gaia SDK.
This Flatpak packages the installer for easy distribution. The actual installation runs on bare metal with full system access.
Initial Flatpak release. Packages the halo-ai-core installer for easy distribution.
